build.buildCommand: curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer && composer install --no-dev --no-interaction --prefer-dist --ignore-platform-req=ext-intl --ignore-platform-req=ext-zip && npm ci && npm run build && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan storage:link && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
